prompt: Write the opening paragraph of a children's book about a shy octopus who wants to make friends.
response: In the heart of Coral Reef Cove lived a shy little octopus named Oliver. Now Oliver was no ordinary octopus. He was the most clever and creative cephalopod in the ocean, with the ability to change colors and blend in with any environment. But poor Oliver had one major problem: he was very, very bashful. Whenever a new friend tried to approach him, Oliver would jet away, feeling his tentacles go clammy with nerves...
